name: Junkyard Rush Racing
short_description: Junkyard Rush Racing evokes the rugged charm of southern US style daredevil racing, inspired by the adventurous spirit of "Dukes of Hazzard."Race opponents, complete time trials and take on tournaments in single player - or challenge a friend for a cutthroat couch multiplayer session!
detailed_description:
Junkyard Rush Racing evokes the rugged charm of southern US style daredevil racing, inspired by the adventurous spirit of "Dukes of Hazzard".

Players navigate through diverse environments, including dusty desert roads, ramshackle junkyards, and winding country lanes. Race opponents, complete time trials, participate in tournaments in single player - or challenge a friend for a cutthroat couch multiplayer session!

Junkyard Rush Racing is an arcade car racer with 16 upgradeable and customizable vehicles and 12 tracks.

Players have the option to race AI opponents either in a single race or a tournament format, as well as other players via split screen multiplayer. Additionally, players can try to beat their own time on all available tracks in a time trial game mode.

  • Tournament - play multiple rounds against the same opponents. Gain tournament points each round in 3 modes (Race, Elimination and Time Trial).

  • Race - play a simple round on a chosen track against 5 opponents.

  • Time Trial - Beat set track times, or your own best time.

  • Hotseat - Challenge your friends for a round of split screen multiplayer.

Junkyard Rush Racing challenges your ability to learn the optimal maneuvering strategies for each track, engage opponents in an intense competition, with a limited nitro booster ability that can be strategically deployed for an advantage.

Set your difficulty between Easy, Medium and Hard modes for a preferred racing experience against AI controlled opponents!

Change your view to 3rd person, FPS or close up mode - whatever fits your racing style the best!

English*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Portuguese - Brazil*
*languages with full audio support
